title: Bundle
description: Makes the bundle item craftable using the originally intended recipe which requires bunny fur.
body:
# Bundle Data Pack

> Make use of the bundle!

Makes the bundle item craftable using the originally intended recipe which requires rabbit hide.

**Note**: As of 1.21.2, the bundle has been made craftable, making this pack obsolete. Enjoy your craftable (and now also dyable) bundles!

## How it works

* Obtain 2 strings
* Get 6 rabbit hides
